nasb.text: They are exalted a little while, then they are gone; Moreover, they are brought low and like everything gathered up; Even like the heads of grain they are cut off.

esv.text: They are exalted a little while, and then are gone; they are brought low and gathered up like all others; they are cut off like the heads of grain.

cnv.text: 他們被高舉不過片時，就沒有了， 他們降為卑，如眾人一樣被收拾起來， 他們又如穀穗枯乾。

ccb.text: 他们一时得势，转瞬消逝； 他们沦为卑贱，像其他人一样灭亡， 像麦穗一样被割掉。
